subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-02
subcodes.first_line: When educated people see the priests taking bread and wine in their hands, blowing a few breaths over them and saying
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون نفوس تربیت یافته می بینند که کشیشها نان و شراب را در دست گرفته نفسی بآن می دمند و می گویند
subcodes.subjects: @Christian doctrine and practice, @confession of sins, @critique of Western values; culture, @rejection, opposition and persecution
